task_completion.description: Agent entered the required search term into the search field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Report' is visible in the full-text search input field within the Nuxeo Web UI.

task_completion.description: The search results correctly identify the project reports and exclude non-reports.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search results list displays 'Annual Report 2023' and 'Q3 Status Report', and does NOT display 'Project Proposal'.

task_completion.description: Agent initiated the process to save the current search.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Save Search', or similar dialog/menu is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct name for the saved search.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Project Reports Search' (case-sensitive) is typed into the name input field of the save search dialog.
A success toast notification appears confirming the creation, OR 'Project Reports Search' is visible as an active/selectable item in the saved searches dropdown or left navigation panel.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Nuxeo Web UI in a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser interface displaying the Nuxeo application, not a terminal, API client (like Postman), or script editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not mock the answers in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search names and results are seen within the Nuxeo application's DOM/UI elements, not typed into Notepad, gedit, or a similar text editor.

integrity.description: Search results appear to be genuinely returned by the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search results are displayed in Nuxeo's standard data grid or list view with appropriate icons and metadata columns, indicating real system interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target saved search name must be exactly 'Project Reports Search' (case-sensitive). The required search term is 'Report'. A correct search execution will return 'Annual Report 2023' and 'Q3 Status Report' in the results, while successfully excluding 'Project Proposal'.
